calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:26am and concluding at 9:45am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. appearing represented by George Aposhian via zoom.
Defendant Goodwin Trucking Group not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff Benjamin Seeman and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment
Bureau, and against Defendant Goodwin Trucking Grooup as follows:

Damages: $67,344.24
Prejudgment Interest: $21,088.35
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $524.74
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $91,782.33

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
